topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into Embedded C. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for IoT Engineer roles.
whyItMatters: Embedded C is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
examples: Implementing Embedded C in a real-world scenario
Handling edge cases in Embedded C
practiceQuestions: Write a program demonstrating Embedded C.
Fix the bug in the given Embedded C snippet.
interviewQuestions: What are the pros and cons of Embedded C?
How does Embedded C handle memory management?
advancedProjects: Integrate Embedded C into a microservice
Scale Embedded C for 10k concurrent users
companyQuestions: How Amazon asks about Embedded C
